name: seo-snippet-hunter
description: Formats content to be eligible for featured snippets and SERP
capabilities: Creates paragraph-style snippet content (40-60 words) with direct answers
Formats list-based snippets with numbered steps or bullet points
Generates table-structured content for comparison data
Optimizes question-answer pairs for People Also Ask sections
Suggests FAQPage and HowTo schema markup
Provides competitor snippet analysis and recommendations
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis scanned 0 files (0 lines) with no suspicious patterns detected. This is a prompt-only skill with no executable code, network access, file system operations, or external command execution. Risk score: 0/100. The skill focuses on content formatting and SEO optimization through natural language prompts only. Safe for publication.
valueStatement: Content creators struggle to rank in position zero on search results. This skill transforms your content into snippet-optimized formats that increase visibility and drive organic traffic.
limitations: Cannot guarantee position zero ranking as search algorithms change frequently
Requires existing content or topics to optimize - does not conduct keyword research
Schema markup suggestions require manual implementation on your website
Results depend on content quality and domain authority factors

useCases.title: Blog Post Optimization
useCases.description: Transform existing blog posts into featured snippet candidates by restructuring answers, adding FAQ sections, and implementing proper header hierarchy for search engine parsing.

useCases.title: Product Comparison Content
useCases.description: Create table-based comparison snippets for product pages, specifications, and feature lists that search engines can easily extract for rich results.

useCases.title: How-To Guide Formatting
useCases.description: Structure step-by-step tutorials with numbered lists, clear headers, and HowTo schema markup to capture instructional search queries and voice search results.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Snippet Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: I have content about [TOPIC]. Format it into a 40-60 word paragraph snippet that directly answers the question: [QUESTION]. Include the keyword in the first sentence and provide a clear, definitive answer.

promptTemplates.title: List Snippet Creator
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a numbered list snippet (5-8 items) for [TOPIC]. Each item should have a clear header and concise description. Add a brief introductory sentence before the list that includes the target keyword.

promptTemplates.title: Comparison Table Generator
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a comparison table for [PRODUCTS/SERVICES] with columns for [CRITERIA]. Include specifications, pricing, and key differentiators that search engines can extract for comparison snippets.

promptTemplates.title: Complete FAQ Schema Package
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze my content about [TOPIC] and create 6 FAQ question-answer pairs optimized for People Also Ask. Provide the FAQPage JSON-LD schema markup and suggest placement strategy for maximum snippet visibility.

bestPractices: Place direct answers within the first 100 words of content sections for better snippet extraction
Use question-based headers (H2, H3) that match actual search queries from your keyword research
Implement structured data markup (FAQPage, HowTo, Article) to help search engines understand content structure
antiPatterns: Avoid lengthy introductions before answering the main question - search engines prefer immediate, direct responses
Do not use vague or conditional language like 'might' or 'could' - featured snippets favor definitive statements
Avoid embedding answers in images or complex layouts that search engines cannot parse as text

faq.question: What is a featured snippet and why does it matter?
faq.answer: A featured snippet is a highlighted answer box that appears at position zero on Google search results, above organic listings. It drives 8-12% more clicks than position one and establishes authority for your content.

faq.question: Can this skill guarantee position zero ranking?
faq.answer: No skill can guarantee featured snippet placement. Google's algorithm determines snippet selection based on content quality, relevance, authority, and user signals. This skill optimizes your content formatting to maximize eligibility.

faq.question: What types of content work best for featured snippets?
faq.answer: Definition content (40-60 words), numbered lists for processes, bullet points for features, tables for comparisons, and FAQ sections perform best. Content must directly answer specific questions users search for.

faq.question: How long does it take to see results after optimization?
faq.answer: Snippet optimization results typically appear within 2-8 weeks after Google recrawls your content. Monitor performance through Google Search Console and adjust based on impression and click data.

faq.question: Do I need technical skills to implement the recommendations?
faq.answer: Basic implementation requires only content editing skills. Schema markup and structured data may require developer assistance or CMS plugins, though the skill provides copy-paste ready code snippets.

faq.question: Can this skill optimize content for voice search?
faq.answer: Yes, featured snippet optimization directly supports voice search since voice assistants often read featured snippet content as answers. The skill includes voice search optimization tactics in advanced recommendations.
